name: Tour de France Fan Park and Ateliers du Tour - Barcelona
summary: Official free Tour de France Fan Park at Passeig de Lluis Companys during the Barcelona Grand Depart.
whyItMatters: This is the main official fan-zone resource for the Barcelona viewing days and gives a low-risk race atmosphere option away from the Montjuic roadside crowd.
pros: Official ASO/Tour event with free admission
Open across the July 2 team-presentation context and both Barcelona viewing days
Includes giant-screen race feed, partner activities, children's learn-to-ride track, DJ animation, and Tour mascot
cons: Not located at the selected Montjuic viewing spots
Likely crowded during Grand Depart weekend
Source does not give security screening or bag policy

logistics.reservation_needed: No; official source says free admission
logistics.distance_from_viewing_point: About 4 km from Montjuic Park by direct map distance; transit/walking route depends on closures
logistics.transit: Use metro-first planning; TMB recommends prioritizing metro during Grand Depart events
logistics.parking: Do not assume street or garage access during race days; private-vehicle circulation will be heavily disrupted around routes
logistics.road_closure_notes: Check TMB and Ajuntament Grand Depart mobility notices before using this as a pre/post-race stop.

timing.best_visit_window: Fri Jul 3 for lower race-day pressure, or Sat Jul 4 / Sun Jul 5 after confirming Montjuic egress routes

sources.title: Tour de France - Fan Parks and Les Ateliers du Tour
sources.note: Official ASO page confirming Barcelona Fan Park location, free admission, opening dates/hours, and programme.

sources.title: TMB - For the Grand Depart, get around by metro
sources.note: Official Barcelona transit operator page recommending metro and noting reinforced service for July 2, 4, and 5.

open_questions: Will the Ajuntament publish security screening, bag policy, or exact entrance gates for the Fan Park?
Which metro stations are best for reaching Passeig de Lluis Companys after Stage 1 and Stage 2 road closures?
